owner_operator_stated: Site text refers to 'Dr. Townson and his staff' as running the practice; independent listings (Healthgrades, Yelp, WebMD) confirm this is Dr. Ronald Townsend, DDS, sole practitioner/owner.
notes: Address (450 E 75th St) and phone ((773) 874-9555) match exactly. Solo practice, no careers/hiring page found on site.

owner_operator_stated: This record's phone number (773) 375-3759 is associated in public directories with 'Karen Nash, DDS' at 1111 E 87th St, NOT with 'Dental Concepts' (which uses phone (773) 374-9778 per dentalconceptschicago.com and third-party directories).
notes: 1111 E 87th St, Chicago is a shared medical building (Greenwood Place) housing at least two separate dental practices. 'Dental Concepts' (dentalconceptschicago.com, Dr. Henry Moore, phone (773) 374-9778) is a real, live, corroborated site (Homewood + Chicago), but its own contact pages currently show only the Homewood office -- the dedicated Chicago-office subpage 404'd when fetched. This record's phone (773) 375-3759 instead matches a different practice, 'Karen Nash, DDS,' at the same building per Yelp. Cannot confirm which entity actually holds this database record's NPI/location; treating as an ownership conflict per the successor rule rather than guessing.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Delis Ogando, DDS, is described on the About page as owner/'the driving force behind West Town Dental Care'.
notes: Address (1229 N Ashland Ave) and phone ((773) 252-5772) match exactly. Site brand is 'West Town Dental Care' though the legal/domain name is 'West Town Dental Group'. No careers/hiring page found on site.

Address (1725 W North Ave, Ste 102) confirmed via multiple listings, though the fetched homepage rendered as '725 W. North Ave.' (likely a digit-drop rendering artifact); phone (773) 227-1048 matches exactly, which is the primary corroboration. Site is a live but minimal WordPress site with no doctor roster and no careers/hiring page. Third-party directories (Healthgrades, WebMD) separately name Dr. Donald Cha, DDS and Dr. Randi Smulson, DDS as practicing dentists there, but this is not shown on the practice's own website, so left out of the structured doctors list.

owner_operator_stated: Jason Korkus, DDS is named site-wide as founder of Sonrisa Family Dental, a multi-location group.
notes: Address (1044 N Mozart St, Fl 4 Ste 401) and phone ((773) 772-9200) match exactly. Site notes this location is relocating to 1431 N Western Ave, Suite 401 on June 1, 2026. Sonrisa Family Dental is a multi-location group (Back of the Yards, Blue Island, Chicago Heights, Gage Park, Little Village, Oak Lawn, Humboldt Park). A Careers page exists but lists no current specific job openings -- only a generic downloadable/faxable application, so not counted as a hiring page with openings.

owner_operator_stated: Mohamed Waheed, DDS is named brand-wide as 'the doctor' and receives job-application mail at the Bensenville office. Reviews specific to the Chicago (2333 W Chicago Ave) location highlight a 'Dr. Yee'.
notes: Vendor hint (Miswakdentistry.com) was WRONG for this address: Miswak Dentistry's own contact page confirms its address/phone as 852 N Western Ave / (773) 661-0330, not 2333 W Chicago Ave, despite one stray mention of that address on Miswak's homepage. The actual current occupant of 2333 W Chicago Ave, Chicago, IL 60622 is 'Grand Smiles' (pediatric dental, grandsmiles.org), a multi-location group (Bensenville, Chicago, Palos Heights, Rockford) -- name matches this record ('Grand Smiles 2') and the street address matches exactly, so treated as a corroborated match despite a phone mismatch (record has (267) 255-1657; site lists (773) 500-0256 for the Chicago office). Careers page lists 2 open 'Operations Manager' positions site-wide ($104k), location not specified per-opening.
